# Page 3^page=3
More than one CODE on a product Which one is the DPP CODE? 1 ? Goal: Visible recognition of a DPP CODE Add on to: Digital-Passport-ID-methods_part-II_r240619.pdf

# Page 4^page=4
Examples of emblems in use for visible recognition of specific codes: Unique Device Identification UDI EMBLEM For indication „that‘s the UDI CODE“ and to show conformity with UDI. Health Industry Barcode HIBC EMBLEM Pharma Product Number PPN Pharma Zentral Nr. PZN Example: PPN code and PZN code on one label For indication „that‘s a HIBC CODE“ and to show conformity with HIBC. 2

# Page 5^page=5
RFID EMBLEM RFID EMBLEM for notification and indicationEN ISO/IEC 29160 RFID EMBLEM Example: Electronic identification plate EN 17071 Other indicators/markings Fig. source: IEC 61406-1, figure 6 Framed QR indicating a IEC 61406-1/-2 code Special marking BRAILLE code Fig. source: FFI, Ffm. 3
